headlines.title: A Tide-Fueled Trove of Biodiversity in Guinea-Bissau
headlines.summary: The expansive mudflats, sandy beaches, and mangrove forests of the Bijagós archipelago support an array of migratory shorebirds and large numbers of sea turtles.

headlines.title: NASA Welcomes Serbia as Newest Artemis Accords Signatory
headlines.summary: The Republic of Serbia signed the Artemis Accords Thursday during a ceremony hosted by NASA at the agency’s Headquarters in Washington, becoming the 69th nation to join a large community of like-minded nations committed
